title: Cash App Design System – UI Guidelines
content: # Cash App Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe Design System from Directories: Components: The Cash App Design System is a cohesive framework designed to keep consistency and improve efficiency across Cash App’s digital ecosystem. Its reusable components, design guidelines, and interaction patterns form the foundation for an intuitive user experience across both web and mobile platforms. Color System Illustrations Motion Typography Voice and Tone
